title: capnoides ophiocarpa
intro: Capnoides ophiocarpa, also known as Wood's rose or Indian rose, is a flowering plant belonging to the family Capnoidaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Capnoides ophiocarpa include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and ease joint pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
